note: All PS prompts are reply-only. No links. Better Hand emails already use the 1 allowed link for the Amazon store CTA.

templates.story: P.S. Got a Canasta story that still makes you laugh? Reply and tell us. We collect the best ones.
templates.strategy: P.S. What's your go-to opening strategy? Hit reply and tell us. We read every one.
templates.feedback: P.S. Did last week's tip change anything at your table? Reply and tell us. We love hearing what works.
